hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|css|js|jsx)$' | xargs -I {} npx prettier --write "{}" 2>/dev/null || true

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); for p in .env package-lock.json pnpm-lock.yaml .git/; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]]; then echo "Geblokkeerd: $FILE matcht beschermd patroon $p" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -oE "\"file_path\":\"[^\"]+\"" | head -1 | sed -e "s/\"file_path\":\"//" -e "s/\"$//"); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; BASE=$(basename "$FILE"); case "$FILE" in *apps/ti-studio-v2/src/components/personen/*Dialog.tsx|*apps/ti-studio-v2/src/components/personen/*HoverKaart*.tsx|*apps/ti-studio-v2/src/app/*indeling/_components/TeamDialog.tsx|*apps/ti-studio-v2/src/app/*indeling/_components/SpelerDialog.tsx|*apps/ti-studio-v2/src/app/*indeling/_components/StafDialog.tsx) echo "Dialoog-canon geschonden: $FILE. Entiteit-dialogen en hover-kaarten horen onder apps/ti-studio-v2/src/components/<entiteit>/contexts/. Zie .claude/rules/dialoog-canon.md" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; case "$BASE" in HoverKaartSpeler.tsx) case "$FILE" in *apps/ti-studio-v2/*) echo "Dubbeling geblokkeerd: $FILE - canon is components/speler/contexts/HoverKaart.tsx. Uitbreiden, niet dupliceren." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac ;; esac; exit 0'

echo 'HERINNERING: logger uit @oranje-wit/types (NOOIT console.log) | rel_code is enige speler-sleutel | NOOIT pnpm db:push | Deploy: patch/fix direct naar main, release via team-release | Taal: altijd Nederlands | ti-studio-v2 dialogen onder components/<entiteit>/contexts/ — NOOIT dupliceren, grep eerst (.claude/rules/dialoog-canon.md)'
